zh.lifeSummary: 當Reverend John Foxe於1516年出生在英國林可爾史爾波斯頓時，他的父親Henry Charles Foxe "Vaux"26歲，母親Anne Woodward Hawes21歲。他於1547年2月3日與Agnes Randall在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾哈爾可特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1554年移民到比利時安特維爾。他去世於1587年4月18日在英國英格蘭倫敦堂爾 哈姆勒次享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭梅瑟希德艾崔聖 吉列也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reverend John Foxe于1516年出生在英国林可爾史爾波斯頓时，他的父亲Henry Charles Foxe "Vaux"26岁，母亲Anne Woodward Hawes21岁。他于1547年2月3日与Agnes Randall在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾哈爾可特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1554年移民到比利时安特維爾。他去世于1587年4月18日在英国英格兰倫敦堂爾 哈姆勒次享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰梅瑟希德艾崔聖 吉列也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Foxe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Fox
meanings: English: nickname from a word denoting the animal (Middle English, Old English fox), widely used to denote a sly or cunning individual. It was also used for someone with red hair. In England this surname absorbed some early examples of surnames derived from the ancient Germanic personal names mentioned at Faulks and Foulks .
Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an tSionnaigh ‘son of the fox’ (see Tinney ).
Irish: also adopted for Ó Catharnaigh, see Kearney .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Reverend John Foxe was born in 1516, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Henry Charles Foxe "Vaux", was 26 and his mother, Anne Woodward Hawes, was 21. He married Agnes Randall on 3 February 1547, in Charlecote, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He immigrated to Antwerp, Belgium in 1554. He died on 18 April 1587, in Tower Hamlets, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in St Gile's Church, Aintree, Merseyside, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Gile's Church, Aintree, Merseyside, E: St Gile's Church, Aintree, Merseyside, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reverend John Foxe est né en 1516, à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Charles Foxe "Vaux", avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne Woodward Hawes, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Randall le 3 février 1547, à Charlecote, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il a immigré au Anvers, Belgique en 1554. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1587, à Tower Hamlets, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à St Gile's Church, Aintree, Merseyside, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reverend John Foxe 1516 in Boston, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Charles Foxe "Vaux" 26 und seine Mutter Anne Woodward Hawes 21. Er hat am 3. Februar 1547 in Charlecote, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Randall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er ist 1554 nach Antwerpen, Belgien eingewandert. Er starb am 18. April 1587 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Tower Hamlets, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Gile's Church, Aintree, Merseyside, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend John Foxe è nato il nel 1516 nel Boston, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Charles Foxe "Vaux", aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Anne Woodward Hawes, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Randall il 3 febbraio 1547, nel Charlecote, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Immigrato nel Anversa, Belgio nel 1554. Morì il 18 aprile 1587, nel Tower Hamlets, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a St Gile's Church, Aintree, Merseyside, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Reverend John Foxeが1516年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンで生まれた時，父Henry Charles Foxe "Vaux"は26歳，母Anne Woodward Hawesは21歳であった。1547年2月3日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアチャーレコトでAgnes Randallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1554年にベルギーアントウエルペンに移住した。彼は1587年4月18日にイギリスイギリスロンドントウエル ハムレツで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスメルセイシドエイントレスト ギレ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Gile's Church, Aintree, Merseyside, E: 영국 잉글랜드 머세이시드 언트리 스트 길'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Reverend John Foxe(이)가 1516년 영국 링코실르 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Charles Foxe "Vaux"(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Woodward Hawes(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1547년 2월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 찰렉트에서 Agnes Randall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1554년에 벨기에 앤트워펜로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1587년 4월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 타워 함레츠에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 머세이시드 언트리 스트 길'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend John Foxe nasceu em 1516, em Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Charles Foxe "Vaux", tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anne Woodward Hawes, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Randall em 3 de fevereiro de 1547, em Charlecote, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Antuérpia, Bélgica em 1554. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1587, em Tower Hamlets, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em St Gile's Church, Aintree, Merseyside, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Gile's Church, Aintree, Merseyside, E: ст джиле'с чурч, эинтри, мирсисид, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reverend John Foxe родился в 1516 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Charles Foxe "Vaux" было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Woodward Hawes, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Randall 3 февраля 1547 г. в местности чарлекот, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он иммигрировал в антвирпен, Бельгия в 1554 году. Он умер 18 апреля 1587 г. в местности тоуир хамлец, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности ст джиле'с чурч, эинтри, мирсисид, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reverend John Foxe nació en 1516, en Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Charles Foxe "Vaux", tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anne Woodward Hawes, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Agnes Randall el 3 de febrero de 1547, en Charlecote, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Inmigró a Amberes, Bélgica en 1554. Murió el 18 de abril de 1587, en Tower Hamlets, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en St Gile's Church, Aintree, Merseyside, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
